summary: Alley Boss begins a new livestream to showcase his student, Dwayne, who has undergone significant training to improve his gaming skills. Dwayne demonstrates his rapid growth by winning nine consecutive ranking matches with ease, silencing skeptics who doubted his progress. Despite his initial nervousness, Dwayne continues his streak, ultimately aiming to reach the Bronze rank without a single loss to secure a break for his mentor.
key_moments: Alley Boss initiates a high-stakes bet with his viewers regarding Dwayne's performance.
Dwayne wins nine consecutive matches, showcasing his improved mechanics and strategic understanding.
Dwayne faces a new, challenging opponent who holds a 13-win streak, escalating the pressure of the challenge.
